name: credisync
description: Aplicacion web de gestion de prestamos en frontend puro (HTML + CSS + JavaScript), con persistencia local usando `localStorage`.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-sw.mjs && set VITE_CACHE_DIR=.vite-cache-local&& vite build
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/generate-sw.mjs && set VITE_CACHE_DIR=.vite-cache-local&& vite build --outDir dist-prod
scripts.build:staging: node scripts/generate-sw.mjs && set VITE_CACHE_DIR=.vite-cache-local&& vite build --outDir dist-staging
scripts.deploy:hosting:prod: npm run build:prod && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting:prod
scripts.deploy:hosting:staging: npm run build:staging && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting:staging
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run deploy:staging:backend && npm run deploy:hosting:staging
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:hosting:prod
